headline: Keurig Dr Pepper picks Peet’s CEO to helm coffee spinoff
summary: Rafael Oliveira will lead the newly created Global Coffee Co. once it separates from the beverage giant.

raw.headline: Keurig Dr Pepper picks Peet’s CEO to helm coffee spinoff
raw.summary: Rafael Oliveira will lead the newly created Global Coffee Co. once it separates from the beverage giant.

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Acquires JDE Peet’s and  Announces Rafael Oliveira as CEO of Future Global Coffee Co.
summary: Transaction creates global coffee powerhouseOliveira will continue as JDE Peet’s CEO and joins KDP to lead combined coffee business This is a joint press release by Keurig Dr Pepper Inc., Kodiak BidCo B.V. and JDE Peet’s N.V. in connection with the recommended public cash offer by Kodiak BidCo B.V. (the “Offeror”) for all issued and outstanding ordinary shares in the capital of JDE Peet’s N.V. (such offer, the “Offer”, such shares, the “Shares” and each holder of such Shares, a “Shareholder”). T

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Acquires JDE Peet's and Announces Rafael Oliveira as CEO of Future Global Coffee Co.
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. ("KDP" or "the Company") (NASDAQ: KDP) and JDE Peet's N.V. ("JDE Peet's") (EURONEXT: JDEP) jointly announced that KDP has acquired 96.22% of the Shares of JDE Peet's in the Offer. The transaction marks a major milestone in the Company's strategic transformation and long‑term growth agenda.
